name: Call Outs
notes: Process of Call Out: Reference, Date of work, Installation time, Programming time, invoice to client, job card, special instructions

name: Stock orders:
notes: 1. Create a task. 2. Provide clear instructions to order equipment. 3. Confirm client charging. 4. Provide job card if relevant

name: Stock back from site
notes: 1. Create task. 2. Attach clear pic. 3. Reason for return. 4/5/6 Crediting/returning/refunding details

name: When stock is required for installation
notes: 1. Create task. 2. Specify items & quantities. 3. Send in advance, day before.

name: Stock collected from Supplier:
notes: 1. Create a task. 2. Attach supplier invoice and send to Mel with details.

name: General Stock
notes: Should you require stock urgently that is not quoted for. Create task with item details, invoicing, install/programming costs

name: Stock from project to project:
notes: Create task with item details, crediting, project allocation, cost, replacement, install/programming costs

name: Demo Stock:
notes: 1. Create a task to manually book out. 2. Item on site >7 days requires invoicing.
